name: specification-website
title: The Website Specification
description: Read-only MCP server exposing every spec page of specification.website as queryable tools — search, list_topics, get_topic, get_checklist, get_categories, get_changes — plus an `audit_url` prompt for URL audits.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across every spec page.

tools.name: list_topics
tools.description: List spec topics, optionally filtered by category and/or status.

tools.name: get_topic
tools.description: Fetch full canonical Markdown for a single spec page by slug.

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Return a Markdown checklist of spec items, grouped by category.

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: List the ten top-level categories with summaries and topic counts.

tools.name: get_changes
tools.description: List spec changes since a date — new pages, status changes, rewrites, removals — resolved to current topics.

prompts.name: audit_url
prompts.description: Generate an audit plan for a target URL against this spec.
